title: VistA Sign-On
description: VistA Kernel sign-on flow within the browser terminal. This contract governs the platform surface and access posture only. Access/verify code authentication is VistA-native; the platform does not restate VistA sign-on authorization. Sign-on RPCs (XUS SIGNON SETUP, XUS AV CODE) are well-documented in the XWB protocol. Browser terminal sign-on under UTF-8 is not yet verified per distro runtime truth.
